user.title: Smart Shutter – Basic Configuration
user.description: Set your location, temperature sensors and activation threshold.

data_description.sunset_type: Determines from which sun elevation the automation is deactivated in the evening.
data_description.temperature_threshold: Shutters are only controlled above this outdoor temperature.

error.no_sensors: At least one temperature sensor must be selected.

data_description.control_mode: Standard mode uses cover.set_cover_position. Custom mode calls the configured service.
data_description.custom_service: Only for custom mode, e.g. tasmota.send_command.
data_description.custom_target_field: Only for custom mode: service data key for the selected entity (leave empty if not needed).
data_description.custom_target_template: Only for custom mode: template for the target value written to the target field. Placeholders {position}, {state}, {entity_id} are allowed (e.g. cmnd/Rollladen/4/TuyaSend2).
data_description.custom_command_field: Only for custom mode: service data key used for the command.
data_description.custom_command_template: Only for custom mode: placeholders {position}, {state}, {entity_id} are allowed (e.g. TuyaSend2 2,{position}).
data_description.angle_fully_closed: Below this angular distance to the sun the shutter is fully closed.
data_description.angle_half_closed: Below this angular distance to the sun the shutter is half-closed.

error.name_required: Please provide a name for the window.
error.angle_half_must_exceed_closed: Half-close angle must be greater than the fully-close angle.
error.custom_service_invalid: Custom service must use domain.service format.
error.custom_command_required: Please provide a custom command template.

force_update.name: Force Update
force_update.description: Clears the internal state cache and immediately re-sends shutter commands for all configured windows, regardless of the last commanded state. Useful for verifying that the correct commands (e.g. via MQTT) are being sent.
